mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_USER_REWARD_HISTORY.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_USER_REWARD_HISTORY (ID, USER_ID, REWARD_POLICY_ID, REWARD_REFERENCE_ID, USER_REWARD_EXP) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{rewardPolicyId}, #{rewardReferenceId}, #{userRewardExp})
mapper.select: SELECT ID, USER_ID, REWARD_POLICY_ID, REWARD_REFERENCE_ID, USER_REWARD_EXP, USER_REWARD_CREATE_AT FROM TBL_USER_REWARD_HISTORY WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY USER_REWARD_CREATE_AT DESC, ID DESC
SELECT NVL(SUM(TURH.USER_REWARD_EXP), 0) FROM TBL_USER_REWARD_HISTORY TURH JOIN TBL_REWARD_POLICY TRP ON TURH.REWARD_POLICY_ID = TRP.ID WHERE TURH.USER_ID = #{userId} AND TRP.REWARD_TYPE = 'LEARN'
